assertions.assertion: Client secret uses Type = IdentityServerConstants.SecretTypes.X509CertificateBase64 or SecretTypes.JsonWebKey
assertions.rationale: Line 36 uses Type = "X509Certificate" — a raw string instead of IdentityServerConstants.SecretTypes.X509CertificateBase64. This is not the correct constant value.

assertions.assertion: Uses GrantTypes.Code as the grant type
Calls AddJwtBearerClientAuthentication() on the IdentityServer builder
assertions.rationale: The response never calls AddJwtBearerClientAuthentication(). This Duende-specific builder method is not mentioned.

assertions.assertion: Includes RedirectUris pointing to the web application
Does NOT use a shared secret (no Sha256() call on a string for this client)
assertions.rationale: No .Sha256() call on a string. The secret uses certificate-based Type.
